commerce_relation_patterns: celebrity curation or ranked favorite -> featured beauty/lifestyle item
food scene or dialogue -> packaged equivalent or adjacent food
material or activity -> supplies used for that activity
practical hack -> same-function object or supporting tool
celebrity first reaction -> tasted product or adjacent snack
cultural topic -> themed product while retaining scene-based alternatives
animal, name, or visual association -> toy or game
character or emotion cue -> mood-related product only when the bridge is explainable
problem and prevention story -> exact tool or hardware solution
design_patterns: dark entertainment frame with oversized two-color headline
full-bleed footage with minimal subtitle and movable product sticker
product sticker placement follows visual vacancy rather than a fixed corner
topic-first product placement can coexist with alternate scene-based candidates
selection_rules: Retain multiple understandable product candidates when the content supports them.
Record relation type and a viewer-understandable explanation for indirect matches.
Do not invent an exact bridge when a still image lacks enough context.
Treat visible views, likes, or reactions as observations, not verified performance evidence.

items.content: Karina bag-item reveal featuring a scalp or hair brush
items.layout: full-bleed celebrity portrait, white/pink headline, yellow supporting text, lower-left product sticker
items.hook: anti-consumption contradiction plus celebrity bag reveal and number-one ranking

commerce_candidates.reason: the item is presented as the celebrity bag pick
the celebrity identity supports a secondary fandom route

items.content: entertainment scene centered on flirting with jajangmyeon
items.layout: textured black frame, giant turquoise/white headline, centered scene, lower subtitle, lower-left product sticker
items.hook: specific actor plus humorous food-scene superlative

commerce_candidates.reason: jajangmyeon dialogue is converted into an immediately purchasable equivalent

items.content: novel paper and drawing demonstration described as popular overseas
items.layout: black top band, oversized yellow/red rounded title, full-bleed hands-on footage, subtitle box, lower-right product sticker
items.hook: overseas popularity plus mysterious new material

commerce_candidates.candidate: notebook, memo paper, or art paper
commerce_candidates.reason: paper and drawing activity directly support paper supplies
the demonstrated action supports adjacent art tools

items.content: unexpected practical use presented as surprising even the manufacturer
items.layout: beige/white community-post interface, explanatory copy, close-up hack footage, lower-left product sticker

commerce_candidates.candidate: visible pouch, bag, or same-function accessory
commerce_candidates.reason: the product should reproduce or support the shown use rather than merely share a keyword

commerce_candidates.candidate: supporting tool used in the hack
commerce_candidates.reason: a tool that enables the demonstrated result is also understandable

items.content: Korean Choco Pie compared with an upgraded foreign chocolate snack
items.layout: white commerce-editorial card, small header, explanatory headline, large centered product pack, small lower-right commerce sticker
items.hook: familiar domestic product versus upgraded substitute

commerce_candidates.reason: the product itself is the subject and visual hero

commerce_candidates.candidate: Choco Pie or similar chocolate snacks
commerce_candidates.reason: the comparison naturally supports substitute shopping choices

items.design_value: strong distinct reference for product-centered buying-guide cards

items.content: Jennie reacting to a snack combination for the first time
items.layout: black header, white/pink two-line headline, celebrity reaction footage, heart accent, lower-left snack sticker
items.hook: celebrity first reaction plus extreme taste claim

commerce_candidates.reason: the footage and reaction directly concern the snack

commerce_candidates.candidate: adjacent snacks used to recreate the combination
commerce_candidates.reason: viewers can purchase the components to reproduce the experience

items.claim_guardrail: describe what is visible in the footage; do not expand it into an unsupported endorsement

items.content: actor visiting Korea with a conflict hook about liking Korean food
items.layout: black header, white/yellow accusation headline, airport footage and airplane illustration, lower subtitle, lower-left food sticker

commerce_candidates.reason: the main topic is Korean food
the visible travel context provides a separate understandable route

items.layout: full-bleed animal footage, centered white subtitle, no title block, lower-right product sticker
items.hook: curiosity about an animal's lifelong behavior

commerce_candidates.reason: the mole creates an immediate visual and name association with the game
the featured animal supports a direct character-product bridge

items.content: intense character scene with a warning about dealing with a psychopath
items.layout: black header, white/blue conflict headline, extreme face close-up, bottom subtitle, upper-left colored plush sticker

commerce_candidates.reason: the plush may relate to changing mood or dual-faced emotion, but the still alone does not prove the intended bridge

items.uncertainty: Exact product bridge requires video context or owner clarification; do not promote this candidate as confirmed.

items.content: shipping or DIY method that uses hardware to prevent a failure
items.layout: full-bleed close-up tutorial, centered subtitle, top-center hardware sticker, no dedicated title band
items.hook: preventing a major mishap with a simple hardware solution

commerce_candidates.candidate: the shown metal plate, bracket, or hardware
commerce_candidates.reason: the hardware directly prevents the demonstrated shipping or DIY problem
supporting tools are valid when their role in preventing the same problem is explainable
